Widgets API

  • Authentication
  • Create Widget
  • List Widgets
  • Get Widget
  • Delete Widget

v2.1 — stable

Widgets API Reference

The Widgets API lets you create, retrieve, and manage widgets programmatically. All requests must be made over HTTPS. HTTP is not supported.

Authentication

The Widgets API uses Bearer token authentication. Include your API key as a Bearer token in the Authorization header of every request.

API keys are available from your account dashboard. Keep your keys secret — do not share them in public repositories or client-side code.

POST /v1/widgets

Creates a new widget. Returns the created widget object on success.

Parameters

ParameterTypeRequiredDescription
namestringYesDisplay name for the widget.
colorstringNoHex color code, e.g. #ff5733.
quantityintegerNoInitial stock quantity. Defaults to 0.

Request body example

{
  "name": "Sprocket XL",
  "color": "#3498db",
  "quantity": 100
}

Response

{
  "id": "wgt_01HZ3K9MXQR7P",
  "name": "Sprocket XL",
  "color": "#3498db",
  "quantity": 100,
  "created_at": "2026-05-19T12:00:00Z"
}

Example request

curl -X POST https://api.widgets.example.com/v1/widgets \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer sk_live_abc123" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"name":"Sprocket XL","color":"#3498db","quantity":100}'

GET /v1/widgets

Returns a paginated list of widgets for your account.

Query parameters

ParameterTypeRequiredDescription
limitintegerNoNumber of results per page. Max 100. Default 20.
starting_afterstringNoCursor for forward pagination (widget ID).
colorstringNoFilter by color hex value.

Response

{
  "data": [
    { "id": "wgt_01HZ3K9MXQR7P", "name": "Sprocket XL", "color": "#3498db" },
    { "id": "wgt_02AB8FGHJKLM2", "name": "Sprocket SM", "color": "#e74c3c" }
  ],
  "has_more": false,
  "total_count": 2
}

Example request

curl https://api.widgets.example.com/v1/widgets?limit=20 \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer sk_live_abc123"

GET /v1/widgets/{id}

Retrieve a widget by its unique identifier.

Path parameters

ParameterTypeRequiredDescription
idstringYesThe widget ID.

Response

{
  "id": "wgt_01HZ3K9MXQR7P",
  "name": "Sprocket XL",
  "color": "#3498db",
  "quantity": 100,
  "created_at": "2026-05-19T12:00:00Z"
}

Example request

curl https://api.widgets.example.com/v1/widgets/wgt_01HZ3K9MXQR7P \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer sk_live_abc123"

DELETE /v1/widgets/{id}

Permanently deletes a widget. This action cannot be undone.

Path parameters

ParameterTypeRequiredDescription
idstringYesThe widget ID to delete.

Response

{
  "id": "wgt_01HZ3K9MXQR7P",
  "deleted": true
}

Example request

curl -X DELETE https://api.widgets.example.com/v1/widgets/wgt_01HZ3K9MXQR7P \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer sk_live_abc123"

Code samples

Select a language:

  • curl
  • Node.js
  • Python
  • Ruby
